subject: chemistry
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.19
question_html:
Which conditions are required for the reaction between two molecules?

    I. a collision
    II. E ≥ Ea
    III. proper orientation

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III
examiners_html: This question on collision theory was one of the best answered in the exam.
